description: The classic sliding tile puzzle game. Combine matching number tiles by sliding them across the board. Reach the 2048 tile to win — simple to learn, impossible to put down.
shortDescription: Merge tiles to reach 2048.

shortDescription: Grow your snake by eating glowing orbs.

controls.mouse: Move mouse to steer

shortDescription: Eat smaller cells and grow bigger.

description: The legendary fan-made Smash Bros game in your browser. Play as Mario, Sonic, Naruto, Goku and dozens more. Battle locally or against AI across many classic stages.
shortDescription: Browser Smash Bros with iconic characters.
instructions: Knock opponents off the stage to score. Higher damage = farther they fly.

controls.keyboard: Player 1: WASD move, J attack, K special, L shield

title: Mutilate a Doll 2
description: A physics sandbox where you spawn weapons, tools, and objects to interact with a ragdoll. Completely open-ended — no objectives, just creative destruction.
shortDescription: Physics sandbox — ragdoll destruction toy.
instructions: Spawn items from the menu and use them on the ragdoll.

controls.mouse: Spawn and throw objects, interact with ragdoll

title: Bouncy Rush
description: Guide your bouncy ball through an obstacle-filled course. Timing each bounce perfectly is the key to survival in this simple yet addictive hypercasual runner.
shortDescription: Bounce your way through obstacles.
instructions: Tap or click to bounce. Time your bounces to avoid obstacles.

controls.mouse: Click to bounce

title: Basketball FRVR
description: Clean, satisfying basketball shooting game. Aim and shoot to score baskets. The basket moves as you progress, testing your arc and timing. Endlessly replayable.
shortDescription: Shoot hoops with satisfying arc physics.
instructions: Click and drag to aim your shot. Release to shoot. Nail the arc to score.

controls.mouse: Click drag and release to shoot

title: Archery World Tour
description: Travel the world competing in archery tournaments. Account for wind, distance, and elevation as you aim for bullseyes across stunning international locations.
shortDescription: Shoot bullseyes across global archery ranges.
instructions: Aim with the moving target and click when lined up for the bullseye.

controls.mouse: Move to aim, click to release arrow

title: Pool Club
description: Play 8-ball pool against players around the world. Realistic physics, multiple tables, and a progression system. Pot all your balls then sink the 8-ball to win.
shortDescription: Realistic 8-ball pool against online opponents.
instructions: Aim the cue, set power, and shoot. Pot all your balls then sink the 8-ball.

controls.mouse: Aim cue, click and drag for power

title: Boxing Random
description: Two players face off in wacky boxing matches where the rules change every round. Ragdoll physics make every punch hilarious. First to 5 knockdowns wins.
shortDescription: Wacky 2-player boxing with random rules.
instructions: Hit your opponent to knock them over. Different random rules apply each round.

controls.keyboard: Player 1: W to punch | Player 2: Up arrow to punch

title: Snow Rider 3D
description: Race down an infinite snowy mountain on a sled. Dodge trees, rocks and snowmen while collecting gifts. Beautiful 3D winter visuals make this endlessly calming and fun.
shortDescription: Sled down an endless snowy mountain.
instructions: Steer left and right to avoid obstacles. Collect presents for bonus points.

controls.keyboard: Left/Right arrows to steer

title: Rocket Soccer Derby
description: Drive rocket-powered cars and hit a giant ball into the enemy goal. Inspired by Rocket League, this browser version captures the same chaotic joy. Boost, jump and score.
shortDescription: Rocket-powered cars playing soccer.
instructions: Drive into the ball to hit it towards the enemy goal. Collect boost to go faster.

controls.keyboard: WASD to drive, Space for boost

title: Basketball Legends
description: Play 1v1 or 2v2 basketball with legendary players. Dribble past defenders, pull off trick shots, and dunk on your opponent. Multiple play modes and unlockable characters.
shortDescription: 1v1 basketball with legendary players.
instructions: Dribble past your opponent and shoot to score. Use special moves to gain an advantage.

controls.keyboard: WASD to move, B to shoot/steal, V to super shot

title: Solitaire Classic
description: The iconic Klondike solitaire game, clean and free in your browser. Build four foundation piles by suit from Ace to King. Satisfying, relaxing, and endlessly replayable.
shortDescription: Classic Klondike solitaire in your browser.
instructions: Move cards to build sequences in alternating colors. Build foundations from Ace to King.

controls.mouse: Click or drag cards to move them

title: Spider Solitaire
description: Spider Solitaire uses two decks and is one of the most challenging solitaire variants. Build complete sequences from King to Ace in the same suit to clear the tableau.
shortDescription: The challenging 2-deck solitaire variant.
instructions: Build sequences from King to Ace in the same suit. Complete all 8 sequences to win.

controls.mouse: Click or drag cards to move them

title: FreeCell
description: Unlike Klondike, almost every FreeCell deal is solvable with the right strategy. Use the four free cells as temporary storage to build all cards up to the foundations.
shortDescription: Strategic solitaire with four free cells.
instructions: Use the four free cells to temporarily hold cards. Build foundations from Ace to King by suit.

controls.mouse: Click or drag cards to move them

title: Bubble Shooter
description: Aim and shoot bubbles to match groups of three or more of the same color. Pop all the bubbles before they reach the bottom. Hundreds of increasingly challenging levels.
shortDescription: Match and pop colorful bubbles.
instructions: Aim your bubble shooter and fire. Match 3 or more bubbles of the same color to pop them.

controls.mouse: Move to aim, click to shoot

title: Zuma Deluxe
description: Fire colored balls from the frog to match groups of 3 or more in the rolling chain. Clear the chain before it reaches the skull. A classic puzzle game with satisfying combos.
shortDescription: Shoot colored balls to destroy the chain.
instructions: Aim and shoot balls to match colors in the chain. Match 3+ to destroy them.

controls.mouse: Move to aim, left-click to shoot, right-click to swap ball color

title: Candy Crush Saga
description: The legendary match-3 puzzle game with hundreds of levels. Swap and match candies to clear objectives, unlock special candy types, and progress through a sweet world.
shortDescription: Match colorful candies in this mega-hit puzzle game.
instructions: Swap adjacent candies to match 3 or more. Clear objectives to complete each level.

controls.mouse: Click and drag candies to swap them

title: Cut the Rope
description: The beloved physics puzzle game. Cut ropes at the right moment to swing candy into the little monster Om Nom's mouth. Hundreds of levels with increasingly clever contraptions.
shortDescription: Feed Om Nom candy by cutting the ropes.
instructions: Cut ropes to swing the candy into Om Nom's mouth. Collect stars for bonus points.

controls.mouse: Click and drag to cut ropes

title: Papa's Pizzeria
description: Take orders, build pizzas and manage your restaurant in the beloved classic from Flipline Studios. Keep customers happy to earn tips and upgrades in this addictive management game.
shortDescription: Manage Papa's pizza restaurant in this classic sim.
instructions: Take customer orders, build pizzas with the right toppings, and bake them to perfection.

controls.mouse: Click to take orders, drag toppings, manage timers

title: Papa's Burgeria
description: Work the grill and build perfect burgers for Papa's Burgeria customers. Get the patties right, stack ingredients in the correct order, and keep the line moving to earn big tips.
shortDescription: Run Papa's burger joint — grill, stack, serve.
instructions: Grill patties to order, stack toppings correctly, and serve customers before they get impatient.

controls.mouse: Click to cook, drag and drop ingredients to build burgers

title: Papa's Freezeria
description: Run a beachside ice cream shop. Blend drinks, add mix-ins, and top with syrups and whipped cream. Keep up with the summer rush to earn maximum tips.
shortDescription: Blend frozen treats in this cool Papa sim.
instructions: Blend ingredients to the right consistency, add toppings in the correct order, and serve happy customers.

controls.mouse: Click to blend, drag toppings to add them

title: Run 3
description: Run through an infinite series of rotating space tunnels, jumping over gaps and switching gravity. The tunnels get more complex and the gaps larger as you progress.
shortDescription: Run through rotating space tunnels endlessly.
instructions: Run forward automatically. Jump over gaps. Rotate the tunnel by running on the walls.

controls.keyboard: Left/Right arrows to steer, Space to jump

title: Run 2
description: The original tunnel running game that spawned a series. Navigate a rotating corridor through outer space, jumping over gaps and switching gravity to keep going.
shortDescription: The original space tunnel running game.
instructions: Run and jump through the tunnel. Rotate by running on the walls to avoid falling off.

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys to steer, Space to jump

title: Fancy Pants Adventure
description: Guide the pants-wearing stickman through beautifully smooth platformer levels. The fluid animation and momentum-based movement feel unlike any other browser platformer.
shortDescription: Smooth stickman platformer with bouncy movement.
instructions: Run, jump, and roll through levels. Collect squiggles and find the exit.

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys to run and jump, Down to roll

title: Super Mario 63
description: An impressive fan-made Super Mario 64 port for the browser. Run, jump, triple jump, and wall-kick through hub worlds collecting stars. Captures the magic of the N64 classic.
shortDescription: Fan-made Mario 64-style platformer in the browser.
instructions: Collect stars by completing level objectives. Each course has multiple stars to find.

controls.keyboard: WASD to move, Space to jump, S to crouch
controls.mouse: Control camera

title: N-Game
description: Navigate a minimalist ninja through levels filled with mines, lasers, and physics traps. The simple art style hides incredibly precise platforming that rewards mastery.
shortDescription: Minimalist ninja platformer with deadly obstacles.
instructions: Reach the exit of each level. Collect gold along the way. Avoid all hazards.

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys to run, Z to jump

title: Learn to Fly 3
description: Help a determined penguin learn to fly. Launch from a ramp, use boosters and gliders, and upgrade your gear between runs. Keep improving your distance until you reach the moon.
shortDescription: Launch a penguin and upgrade for maximum distance.
instructions: Launch your penguin and use boosters to go further. Earn cash to buy upgrades.

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys to steer, Space to use boost
controls.mouse: Click to activate special items

title: Fireboy and Watergirl 2
description: Fireboy and Watergirl return in the Light Temple. Use light beams and mirrors to solve puzzles and guide both characters to their exits. Play with a friend or control both.
shortDescription: Co-op puzzle platformer in the light temple.
instructions: Guide both characters to their exits. Use mirrors to redirect light beams and open doors.

controls.keyboard: Fireboy: Arrow Keys | Watergirl: WAD

title: Fireboy and Watergirl 3
description: The dynamic duo ventures into the Ice Temple. New ice mechanics let you slide across frozen surfaces and solve uniquely chilly puzzles. Works great solo or with a partner.
shortDescription: Co-op puzzle platformer in the ice temple.
instructions: Navigate icy platforms and solve puzzles. Each character can only touch their matching pools.

controls.keyboard: Fireboy: Arrow Keys | Watergirl: WAD

title: Stick Fight Online
description: Two stickmen beat each other senseless across chaotic stages. Pick up weapons, use the environment, and knock your opponent out. Fast rounds make for great local multiplayer.
shortDescription: 2-player stickman brawler with weapons.
instructions: Beat your opponent by knocking out their health. Grab weapons for an advantage.

controls.keyboard: Player 1: WASD move + F attack | Player 2: Arrow keys + L attack

title: Tug the Table
description: Two players compete to pull a table to their side of the screen. Hold your button to grab and pull. The first player to drag the table off screen wins. Simple, tense and hilarious.
shortDescription: 2-player tug of war — pull the table to your side.
instructions: Hold your key to grab and pull the table. Drag it all the way to your side to win.

controls.keyboard: Player 1: hold E | Player 2: hold I

title: Monkey Mart
description: Grow produce on your farm, stock your supermarket shelves, and serve customers as a hardworking monkey. An addictive idle management game with charming visuals.
shortDescription: Run a supermarket as a busy monkey.
instructions: Harvest crops and stock shelves. Serve customers automatically. Use cash to expand your mart.

controls.keyboard: WASD or Arrow keys to move
controls.mouse: Click to interact

title: Capybara Clicker
description: Click the capybara to earn capybaras, then buy upgrades to generate more automatically. The internet's favorite animal now starring in its own idle clicker.
shortDescription: Click capybaras and build an army of them.
instructions: Click the capybara to earn capybaras. Buy upgrades to multiply your capybara production.

controls.mouse: Click to earn capybaras, click upgrades to purchase

title: Banana Clicker
description: Click the banana. Buy upgrades. Get more bananas. The most absurdly addictive clicker game of the moment. Simple mechanics hide surprising depth in the upgrade tree.
shortDescription: The meme clicker — click bananas obsessively.
instructions: Click the banana to earn bananas. Buy upgrades to automate banana production.

controls.mouse: Click banana to earn, click shop items to buy

title: Pokedoku
description: A daily Pokémon grid puzzle. Fill each cell with a Pokémon that satisfies both row and column criteria. Each Pokémon can only be used once, and you only get 9 guesses.
shortDescription: Pokémon meets Sudoku — fill the 3x3 grid.
instructions: Fill each cell with a Pokémon that satisfies both its row and column condition. 9 guesses total.

controls.keyboard: Type Pokémon names to search
controls.mouse: Click to select cell and confirm guess

title: Immaculate Grid
description: A daily sports trivia challenge. Fill a 3x3 grid where each cell requires a player who satisfies both the row and column criteria. Tests the depth of your sports knowledge.
shortDescription: Sports trivia grid — fill 9 squares with players.
instructions: Name a player who played for both the row team/stat and column team/stat. 9 guesses total.

controls.keyboard: Type player names to search
controls.mouse: Click cells to select

title: Rankdle
description: Watch short clips of players in popular games and guess what rank they are. Daily challenges test your ability to spot the differences between skill levels. A great daily puzzle for gamers.
shortDescription: Guess the rank of players in game clips.
instructions: Watch the clip and guess the player's rank. Closest guess wins the most points.

controls.mouse: Click to select your rank guess

title: Quordle
description: Solve four Wordle puzzles at the same time using the same guesses. Each guess applies to all four boards. You have 9 attempts to solve all four 5-letter words.
shortDescription: Guess 4 Wordle words simultaneously.
instructions: Type a 5-letter word. Your guess reveals color clues on all four boards simultaneously.

controls.keyboard: Type letters and press Enter
controls.mouse: Click the on-screen keyboard

title: Sporcle
description: The world's largest trivia quiz site. Test your knowledge on geography, pop culture, science, sports, music and more. Play daily quizzes or challenge friends.
shortDescription: Thousands of trivia quizzes on every topic.
instructions: Type your answers before the timer runs out. Each quiz has different rules and objectives.

controls.keyboard: Type answers
controls.mouse: Click to select or submit

title: TypeRacer
description: Compete against players worldwide in real-time typing races. Type the given text as fast and accurately as possible. Track your WPM, improve over time, and climb the leaderboards.
shortDescription: Race by typing — the faster you type the faster you go.
instructions: Wait for the light, then type the text shown as fast and accurately as possible.

controls.keyboard: Type the on-screen text to race

title: Nitro Type
description: Type your way to victory in multiplayer racing. The faster you type, the faster your car goes. Earn cash to buy new cars and compete against players worldwide.
shortDescription: Typing racing game with real cars and upgrades.
instructions: Type the displayed text as fast as possible. Your car's speed matches your WPM.

controls.keyboard: Type the displayed text accurately

title: 10 Fast Fingers
description: The popular 1-minute typing speed test. Type as many words as possible in 60 seconds. Compete in multiplayer races or practice with custom texts to improve your WPM.
shortDescription: Test your typing speed in 60 seconds.
instructions: Type the highlighted word and press Space to advance. Finish as many words as possible in 60 seconds.

controls.keyboard: Type words and press Space to advance

title: Kahoot
description: The world's most popular quiz platform. Join a live game using a code, answer questions against others in real time, and see how you rank on the leaderboard. Used in schools worldwide.
shortDescription: Live trivia quiz games — join with a game pin.
instructions: Enter the game pin to join. Select the correct answer before the timer runs out.

controls.mouse: Click the answer button

title: Quizlet Live
description: Compete in live team-based quizzes built from Quizlet study sets. Your team must collectively answer questions by choosing the right definition for each term. Great for study groups.
shortDescription: Team-based study quiz game.
instructions: Work with your team to match terms to definitions. Only your device shows certain answers.

controls.mouse: Click your answer

title: Scratch Games
description: Explore thousands of free games created by students and developers on the Scratch platform. From simple platformers to complex RPGs — there's something new to discover every visit.
shortDescription: Thousands of community-made games.

controls.keyboard: Varies by game
controls.mouse: Varies by game

title: Poptropica
description: Create your Poptropican and explore dozens of themed islands, each with its own story and puzzles to solve. Collect items, talk to characters, and complete quests in this beloved adventure world.
shortDescription: Adventure across islands solving mysteries.
instructions: Walk around the island, collect items, and interact with characters to solve each island's mystery.

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys to move
controls.mouse: Click to interact with objects and characters

title: Club Penguin Rewritten
description: A community-revived version of the original Club Penguin. Customize your penguin, play mini-games, chat with friends, and explore the island just like in the original.
shortDescription: The beloved virtual penguin world, revived.
instructions: Walk around the island, play mini-games in each area, and decorate your igloo.

controls.mouse: Click to walk and interact
controls.keyboard: Type to chat

title: Jackbox Games
description: Play hilarious party games with friends using phones as controllers. From Quiplash to Drawful to Trivia Murder Party — Jackbox has the best couch co-op games available online.
shortDescription: Party games for groups — phone as controller.
instructions: One player hosts on screen. Everyone else joins on their phone using the room code.

controls.mobile: Players join at jackbox.tv on their phone
controls.keyboard: Host controls game flow

title: EvoWars.io
description: Start as a primitive caveman and evolve through history by eliminating other players. Each kill grants XP to evolve into a stronger warrior — from knight to samurai to future soldier.
shortDescription: Evolve your warrior through the ages by killing.
instructions: Attack smaller players to gain XP. Evolve to become stronger. Avoid larger evolved players.

controls.mouse: Move to steer, auto-attacks nearby enemies

title: Wings.io
description: Fly a plane and shoot down other players in this fast-paced aerial .io game. Collect power-up weapons, dodge enemy fire, and become the top ace in a chaotic free-for-all.
shortDescription: Multiplayer plane shooter .io game.
instructions: Fly your plane and shoot enemies. Collect power-ups to get stronger weapons.

controls.mouse: Move to steer plane, auto-fires at enemies

title: Stabfish.io
description: Swim around and stab other fish with your snout to eat them and grow larger. Avoid fish bigger than you and hunt smaller ones in this fast-paced underwater .io game.
shortDescription: Stab other fish with your spike to grow bigger.
instructions: Swim into smaller fish to stab and eat them. Avoid bigger fish that can eat you.

controls.mouse: Move mouse to steer your fish

title: Age of War 2
description: Defend your base and attack the enemy through the ages of war. Start with cavemen, evolve to medieval knights, then modern soldiers and futuristic robots. A tower defense meets strategy classic.
shortDescription: Evolve your army from cavemen to robots.
instructions: Spawn units to attack the enemy base. Upgrade your base and evolve to stronger eras.

controls.mouse: Click to spawn units and upgrade

title: Kingdom Rush
description: Place towers, upgrade them, and use hero abilities to defend your kingdom from waves of trolls, orcs, and dark wizards. Kingdom Rush is the pinnacle of the tower defense genre.
shortDescription: The gold standard of tower defense games.
instructions: Place and upgrade towers along enemy paths. Use your hero and abilities to stop waves.

controls.mouse: Click to place, upgrade, and activate abilities

title: Electric Man 2
description: Compete in an electrified stickman fighting tournament with stylish slow-motion combat. Punch, kick and throw opponents with perfectly timed moves in this visually striking brawler.
shortDescription: Slow-motion stickman fighting tournament.
instructions: Use slow motion strategically. Grab and throw enemies into walls for extra damage.

controls.keyboard: WASD to move, J/K/L to punch/kick/grab

title: Stickman Archer
description: Face off against stickman archers in tense one-shot duels. Aim for the kill shot while using trees and terrain for cover. One arrow — one kill. Can you be the last archer standing?
shortDescription: One-shot archer duels between stickmen.
instructions: Aim your arrow at the enemy stickman. Release at the right moment for a kill shot.

controls.mouse: Move to aim, click to fire

title: Super Mario Flash
description: A faithful fan recreation of Super Mario Bros in Flash/browser form. Run and jump through classic Mario levels, stomp Goombas, and save the mushroom kingdom.
shortDescription: Fan-made Super Mario in your browser.

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys to run and jump, Z to run faster

title: Water Sort Puzzle
description: Pour colored water between tubes until each tube contains only one color. Sounds simple — the later levels will bend your brain. Relaxing yet deeply satisfying.
shortDescription: Sort colored water into matching tubes.
instructions: Tap a tube to select it, then tap another to pour. Sort all colors into single-color tubes.

controls.mouse: Click tube to select, click another tube to pour

title: Word Search
description: Classic word search puzzles with thousands of themes. Find all the hidden words in the grid — they may go forward, backward, up, down, or diagonally. Multiple difficulties.
shortDescription: Find hidden words in the letter grid.
instructions: Find all listed words hidden in the letter grid. Click the first and last letter of each word.

controls.mouse: Click and drag to highlight words

title: Block Puzzle
description: Place Tetris-style blocks on the board to fill and clear lines and columns. Unlike Tetris, there's no time pressure — place blocks thoughtfully to maximize your score.
shortDescription: Tetris-style block placement with no time pressure.

controls.mouse: Click and drag blocks to place them

shortDescription: Arrange geometric shapes to form silhouettes.

controls.mouse: Click and drag pieces, right-click to rotate

title: Moto X3M Spooky Land
description: The beloved Moto X3M series goes spooky with Halloween-themed levels full of ghosts, pumpkins and cobwebs. Same great motorbike stunt racing with a seasonal twist.
shortDescription: Halloween-themed Moto X3M with spooky levels.

controls.keyboard: Up/Down arrows to accelerate/brake, Left/Right to lean

description: Moto X3M takes on a winter wonderland with ice ramps, snowmen, and icy terrain. Perform backflips on snowy ramps and navigate freezing obstacles at top speed.
shortDescription: Winter-themed motorbike stunt racing.

controls.keyboard: Up/Down arrows to accelerate/brake, Left/Right to lean

title: Moto X3M Pool Party
description: The summer edition of Moto X3M with poolside obstacles, water slides, and beach ramps. Every level is dripping with summer vibes while delivering the same punishing stunt challenge.
shortDescription: Pool party-themed Moto X3M levels.

controls.keyboard: Up/Down arrows to accelerate/brake, Left/Right to lean

title: Hill Climbing Race
description: Drive your vehicle over hilly terrain as far as possible without running out of fuel or flipping over. Collect coins to upgrade your car and unlock new vehicles and tracks.
shortDescription: Drive up hills without running out of fuel.
instructions: Accelerate up hills. Collect coins. Don't run out of fuel or flip over completely.

controls.keyboard: Right arrow to accelerate, Left arrow to brake

title: Death Chase
description: Race motorbikes on dangerous tracks while avoiding armed enemies trying to destroy you. Weave through traffic, dodge missiles, and outrun your pursuers in this adrenaline racer.
shortDescription: Motorbike racing with weaponized vehicles.

controls.keyboard: Up arrow to accelerate, Left/Right to steer

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys or WASD to drive

controls.keyboard: WASD to drive, Space for handbrake, C to change camera

description: Drive specialized stunt cars through extraordinary loop-the-loop and ramp-filled tracks. Time your speed and angle perfectly to land each stunt without crashing.
shortDescription: Pull off car stunts on wild obstacle tracks.

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys to accelerate, brake, and lean

description: Race motocross bikes on outdoor tracks, use nitro boosts on straightaways, and earn trick points by pulling off flips on ramps. A polished motocross experience in the browser.
shortDescription: Motocross racing with nitro boosts and tricks.

title: Super Bikes 2
description: Race sleek superbikes on real-world inspired circuits. Lean into corners, find the racing line, and blast down straights. Multiple bikes and tracks to unlock.

controls.keyboard: Up arrow to accelerate, Down to brake, Left/Right to lean

description: Race massive trucks on outlaw tracks while using weapons to blow up rival truckers. Collect power-ups, upgrade your rig, and dominate the outlaw trucking circuit.

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys to drive, Space to shoot

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys or WASD to drive

description: Complete hair-raising stunt challenges in a city environment. Drive through loops, fly over ramps between skyscrapers, and land perfectly on floating platforms.

controls.keyboard: WASD to drive, Space for handbrake

controls.keyboard: WASD to move, R reload

controls.keyboard: Number keys to spawn units, space to toggle control mode

controls.keyboard: WASD to move

description: Command a SWAT team defending against relentless zombie hordes. Deploy officers, set up barricades, and use special weapons to survive increasingly massive waves.

description: An arena platform shooter where the goal is to blast opponents off the stage with an ever-changing arsenal. Grab weapon crates, use power-ups, and be the last one standing.

title: War Brokers
description: A multiplayer FPS with vehicles — drive tanks, fly helicopters, and fight on foot. Battle in team modes across detailed maps with objectives. One of the best browser FPS games.
shortDescription: Browser FPS with vehicles and team battles.
instructions: Fight on foot or commandeer vehicles. Complete team objectives to win rounds.

controls.keyboard: WASD to move, R reload
controls.mouse: Aim and left-click to shoot

title: Stickman Sniper 3
description: Pick off stickman targets with your sniper rifle from long range. Each level gives you limited bullets to eliminate all targets without hitting innocent bystanders.
shortDescription: Snipe stickmen from long distance.
instructions: Use limited bullets to eliminate all marked stickman targets. Avoid innocents.

controls.mouse: Aim and click to fire

title: Commando Rush
description: Run through enemy-filled levels as a commando, blasting soldiers and dodging bullets. Collect weapon upgrades and survive boss encounters in this classic side-scrolling shooter.
shortDescription: Side-scrolling soldier shooter.
instructions: Move right and shoot enemies. Duck under bullets and collect power-ups.

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys to move, Z to shoot, X for grenades

title: Sniper 3D
description: Complete precision sniper missions across urban environments. Eliminate specific targets from long range with realistic ballistics. Upgrade your rifles between missions.
shortDescription: Realistic 3D sniper missions in urban settings.
instructions: Complete mission objectives using your sniper rifle. Aim carefully for headshots.

controls.mouse: Aim and right-click to zoom, left-click to fire

title: Zombies vs Penguins
description: Control penguins armed with weapons fighting off zombie hordes. Wacky, colorful, and surprisingly tactical — upgrade your penguin squad and survive the zombie onslaught.
shortDescription: Penguins battle the zombie apocalypse.
instructions: Aim and shoot zombies approaching your position. Upgrade weapons between waves.

controls.mouse: Aim and left-click to shoot

title: Mini Golf Club
description: Play mini golf on beautifully crafted courses with windmills, water hazards, and trick shots. Compete online or work through the solo campaign to unlock harder courses.
shortDescription: Relaxing mini golf with creative courses.
instructions: Aim and click to set power. Get the ball in the hole with as few strokes as possible.

controls.mouse: Click and drag to aim, release to set power

title: Bowling Crew
description: Bowl against real players in this realistic online bowling game. Apply spin, aim for the pocket, and pick up difficult spares. Multiple ball types and a deep progression system.
shortDescription: Multiplayer bowling with spin mechanics.
instructions: Swipe to aim and apply spin. Hit the pocket for strikes and clean up spares.

controls.mouse: Click drag and swipe to throw the ball with spin

title: Penalty Kick Online
description: Go head to head in real-time penalty shootouts. One player shoots while the other dives as goalkeeper. Best of 5 penalties — the tension is real in this multiplayer soccer duel.
shortDescription: Real-time multiplayer penalty shootout.
instructions: Aim your shot and choose power as the kicker. Time your dive as the goalkeeper.

controls.mouse: Click to aim and shoot or dive

title: Badminton Blitz
description: Rally birdies in fast-paced badminton matches. Time your smashes and drops perfectly. Defeat AI opponents of increasing difficulty to become the world badminton champion.
shortDescription: Fast-paced badminton with skill shots.
instructions: Hit the shuttlecock back over the net. Use smashes when the birdie is high.

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys to move, Z to hit normally, X to smash

title: Soccer Physics
description: The most unpredictable soccer game ever. One button controls your entire team with bizarre ragdoll physics. Every match descends into hilarious chaos. Great fun with two players.
shortDescription: Wacky one-button soccer with physics chaos.
instructions: Press your button to jump and kick. Score more goals than the opponent.

controls.keyboard: Player 1: W | Player 2: Up Arrow

title: Real Football
description: Manage your football club, sign players, train your squad, and compete in leagues and cups. Full management depth in a browser game — from tactics to transfer budgets.
shortDescription: Realistic browser football management game.
instructions: Manage transfers, training, and tactics. Win matches by setting up the right formation.

controls.mouse: Click menus to manage your team
controls.keyboard: Varies during matches

title: Ice Hockey
description: Play fast and furious ice hockey matches in the browser. Control your players, pass, shoot, and score. Simple controls with just enough depth for exciting close games.
shortDescription: Browser ice hockey with quick matches.
instructions: Move your players to the puck. Pass and shoot to score goals.

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys to move, Z to shoot/pass
controls.mouse: Click to shoot

title: Baseball Pro
description: Step up to the plate or take the mound in this browser baseball game. Time your swing perfectly as a batter or vary your pitches to strike batters out as a pitcher.
shortDescription: Browser baseball with pitching and batting.
instructions: As batter: swing at the right moment. As pitcher: choose pitch type and location.

controls.keyboard: Space to swing/pitch
controls.mouse: Click to aim pitch or swing

title: Darts
description: Play classic 301 or 501 darts against the computer or a friend. Aim for the bullseye, score doubles and triples, and check out perfectly to win the leg.
shortDescription: Classic darts — hit 301 first to win.
instructions: Click and release at the right moment to throw your dart. Aim for high scores and checkouts.

controls.mouse: Move to aim, click to throw

title: Tennis Stars
description: Play tennis from a top-down perspective with full topspin, flat, and slice shot mechanics. Compete in grand slam tournaments and defeat increasingly skilled opponents.
shortDescription: Top-down tennis with topspin and slice.
instructions: Move to the ball and hit with the appropriate shot type. Win games, sets, and the match.

controls.keyboard: WASD to move, Z/X/C for shot types

title: Golf Orbit
description: Hit a golf ball as far as possible — through the atmosphere, into space, and beyond. Upgrade your clubs, balls, and spacesuits to achieve impossible distances.
shortDescription: Launch golf balls into orbit for max distance.
instructions: Click to swing. Use upgrades to go further each shot.

controls.mouse: Click to swing at the right moment

title: Gats.io
description: A top-down arena shooter where you eliminate others to climb the leaderboard. Build walls for cover, choose from multiple weapon classes, and dominate the arena.
shortDescription: Top-down multiplayer shooter with builds.
instructions: Move and shoot other players. Build walls for cover. Collect XP to evolve.

controls.keyboard: WASD to move
controls.mouse: Aim and left-click to shoot, right-click to build

title: Blob.io
description: Control a blob and eat smaller blobs to grow. Split yourself to move faster or capture prey. Avoid larger blobs that will eat you in this relaxing take on the .io formula.
shortDescription: Eat smaller blobs and grow bigger.
instructions: Eat food and smaller blobs to grow. Split to move faster. Avoid blobs larger than you.

controls.mouse: Move mouse to control blob direction

title: Spinz.io
description: Spin up your fidget spinner and knock out other players with your rotating blade. The faster your spin, the more damage you deal. Collect energy to keep spinning.
shortDescription: Spin fidget spinners and eliminate others.
instructions: Move your spinner around and slam into others. Keep collecting orbs to stay fast.

controls.mouse: Move mouse to control spinner position

title: Bonk.io
description: Push opponents off custom physics maps in this multiplayer ball game. Create your own maps, play ranked matches, and master the momentum-based controls to become the top bonker.
shortDescription: Physics ball multiplayer — knock others off.
instructions: Move and slam your ball into others to push them off the edge.

controls.keyboard: WASD to move, X to slow down (heavy mode)

title: Superhex.io
description: Start with a small hexagon base and expand your territory by claiming neighboring hexagons. Cut off opponents to eat their territory in this chill but competitive strategy game.
shortDescription: Expand hexagonal territory in this .io game.
instructions: Move to capture adjacent hexagons. Cut others off to claim their territory.

controls.mouse: Move cursor to control your hexagon

title: Hole.io
description: Control a growing black hole and swallow increasingly large objects — benches, cars, buildings, entire city blocks. Compete with other holes in a timed city-eating frenzy.
shortDescription: Control a black hole and swallow the city.
instructions: Move your hole to swallow objects. Grow large enough to eat bigger and bigger items.

controls.mouse: Click and drag to move the hole

title: Color Switch
description: Guide a bouncing ball through rotating obstacles by only passing through the matching color. One wrong color and you start over. Simple mechanics, brutal difficulty after level 10.
shortDescription: Tap to pass through matching color segments.
instructions: Tap to bounce the ball upward. Pass through the part of the obstacle matching your ball color.

controls.mouse: Click to bounce

title: Crossy Road
description: Help your chicken (and hundreds of other characters) hop across an endless series of roads, rivers, and train tracks without getting squashed. A modern take on the Frogger formula.
shortDescription: Hop across roads, rivers, and trains endlessly.
instructions: Tap to hop forward, left, or right. Cross roads and rivers without getting hit.

controls.keyboard: Arrow keys to hop

title: Tunnel Rush
description: Race through a neon-lit 3D tunnel at breakneck speed, dodging obstacles that appear without warning. The speed continuously increases. How long can you survive?
shortDescription: Speed through a neon tunnel dodging obstacles.
instructions: Move left and right to dodge obstacles. Don't hit anything or it's game over.

controls.keyboard: Left/Right arrows or A/D to dodge

title: Going Balls
description: Guide a ball along a narrow floating track in the sky. One wrong move sends you tumbling into the void. Simple controls but nail-biting precision required on each elevated course.
shortDescription: Roll a ball along a floating track.
instructions: Swipe left/right to steer the ball. Keep it on the track as long as possible.

controls.keyboard: Left/Right arrows

title: Stack Jump
description: Bounce a ball upward through stacked platforms, breaking through colored segments and collecting points. A satisfying hypercasual game where height is the only goal.
shortDescription: Jump through platforms and stack up high.
instructions: Tap to bounce the ball. Break through platforms to rise higher.

controls.mouse: Click to bounce

title: Piano Tiles 2
description: Tap the falling black tiles in time to play famous piano pieces. Don't miss a tile or tap a white one. Increasingly fast tempos and longer songs test your reflexes.
shortDescription: Tap black tiles to play beautiful piano music.
instructions: Tap only the black tiles as they fall. Miss one or tap white and you lose.

controls.mouse: Click black tiles as they fall

title: Idle Farming Business
description: Plant crops, harvest them, and reinvest profits into bigger and better farm equipment. An idle farming game where your empire grows even when you're not actively playing.
shortDescription: Build a farm empire from a single crop.
instructions: Plant and harvest crops. Use earnings to buy better equipment and expand your farm.

controls.mouse: Click to plant, harvest, and purchase upgrades

title: Paper Fold
description: Fold a piece of paper by clicking on fold lines to reveal a hidden image. Match the target silhouette by folding in the right sequence. Meditative and surprisingly satisfying.
shortDescription: Fold paper to match the target image.
instructions: Click fold lines to fold the paper. Match the target image shown.

controls.mouse: Click fold lines to fold

title: Jumping Ball Adventure
description: Guide a bouncy ball through vibrant platformer levels filled with spikes, gaps, and spinning obstacles. Time jumps precisely to collect stars and reach the end of each world.
shortDescription: Jump a ball through colorful obstacle worlds.
instructions: Tap or click to jump. Avoid spikes and obstacles. Collect stars for bonus points.

controls.mouse: Click to jump
controls.keyboard: Space to jump

title: Fireboy Watergirl Crystal Temple
description: The fourth entry in the beloved series ventures into the Crystal Temple. New crystal mechanics and mirrored puzzle rooms add fresh challenges. Coordinate precisely with your partner.
shortDescription: Co-op puzzles in the Crystal Temple.
instructions: Guide both characters to their exits. Use crystal mirrors to redirect and solve puzzles.

controls.keyboard: Fireboy: Arrow Keys | Watergirl: WAD

title: Bad Ice Cream
description: Play as ice cream characters collecting fruits while freezing enemies. Work with a partner to clear each level efficiently, using your freeze ability to create paths and trap enemies.
shortDescription: Co-op ice cream character adventure.
instructions: Collect all the fruit in each level. Freeze enemies and create ice block paths.

controls.keyboard: Player 1: WASD + space to freeze | Player 2: Arrow keys + shift to freeze

title: Wrestle Brothers
description: Grab, throw, and slam your opponent in this chaotic wrestling game for two players. Execute different wrestling moves by combining directional inputs with the action button.
shortDescription: 2-player wrestling with grapples and slams.
instructions: Grab your opponent and throw them into the mat. Use directional inputs for different moves.

controls.keyboard: Player 1: WASD + E | Player 2: Arrow keys + I

title: Cup Pong
description: Play beer pong against a friend or computer. Aim your throw and sink the ball into the opponent's cups. Bounce shots and special throws add depth to this simple but fun party game.
shortDescription: Multiplayer beer pong in your browser.
instructions: Aim and adjust power to throw the ball into opponent's cups. Sink all cups to win.

controls.mouse: Click and drag to aim, release to throw

title: Double Head Soccer
description: Two giant-headed players face off on a tiny soccer pitch. Jump, headbutt, and kick the ball into the goal using your enormous head. Chaotic, hilarious and perfect for quick matches.
shortDescription: Hilarious big-headed soccer for 2 players.
instructions: Jump and use your big head to hit the ball into the opponent's goal.

controls.keyboard: Player 1: W to jump, A/D to move | Player 2: Arrow keys

title: Tank Trouble
description: Battle in a maze where bullets bounce off walls. Shoot your opponents before they shoot you — the ricocheting bullets can come back to destroy you. Classic browser multiplayer.
shortDescription: Bouncy bullet tank battles for 2-3 players.
instructions: Navigate the maze and shoot opponents. Watch out for your own ricocheting bullets.

controls.keyboard: Player 1: ESDF + Q to shoot | Player 2: Arrow keys + M to shoot

title: Bomb It
description: A Bomberman-inspired 2-player arena game. Place bombs to blow up walls and eliminate your opponent. Collect power-ups to get bigger bombs and blast through more blocks.
shortDescription: Bomberman-style 2-player arena game.
instructions: Place bombs strategically to blast your opponent. Collect power-ups to upgrade your bombs.

controls.keyboard: Player 1: WASD + space | Player 2: Arrow keys + shift

title: Dual
description: A unique 2-player game designed for two devices. Point your screens at each other and shoot the spaceship that appears on the other screen. The most creative local multiplayer setup.
shortDescription: 2-player shooter — point phones at each other.
instructions: Hold your device facing the other player's device. Tap to shoot at their spaceship.

controls.keyboard: Space to shoot

title: Ping Pong Pro
description: Compete against a friend or AI in this lightning-fast ping pong game. Add topspin, backspin, and precision placement to outplay your opponent. First to 11 wins the set.
shortDescription: Fast-paced 2-player ping pong.
instructions: Move your paddle to return shots. Apply spin by moving while hitting.

controls.keyboard: Player 1: W/S | Player 2: Up/Down arrows

title: Stickman Wrestling
description: Two stickmen wrestle in an over-the-top brawl. Grapple, throw, and pin your opponent with simple but expressive controls. Ragdoll physics make every match uniquely hilarious.
shortDescription: Silly stickman wrestling match for two.
instructions: Grab and throw your opponent. Pin them to the mat to score.

controls.keyboard: Player 1: WASD + E | Player 2: Arrow keys + O
